title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MAGUILLING ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PIAT, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, TO STA. BARBARA-MAGUILLING ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 25239 / 88 OG No. 17, 2350 (Apr. 27, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7250, March 19, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MAGUILLING ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PIAT, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, TO STA. BARBARA-MAGUILLING ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Maguilling Elementary School in the Municipality of Piat, Province of Cagayan, is hereby changed to Sta. Barbara-Maguilling Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on April 5, 1990 and December 9, 1991, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: March 19, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
